dashboardCardOcrDescription: Scan images or PDFs directly in the browser, then edit and copy the extracted text without touching the server.

dashboardCardAudioDescription: Prepare clean transcodes, extract deliverables, and move tracks through a premium audio lane built for clarity-first output.
dashboardCardGifDescription: Turn short clips into optimized looping GIFs with a faster route for social previews, demos, and lightweight motion assets.
dashboardCardArchiveDescription: Unpack ZIP and RAR bundles, reorganize payloads, and prepare clean archive outputs without leaving the product shell.
dashboardCardWatermarkDescription: Apply consistent watermark overlays across large media sets with a dedicated batch workflow ready for production volume.

toolVideoToGifDescription: This workspace is prepared for optimized GIF creation with trim, compression, and looping controls in the next activation step.
toolArchiveManagerDescription: This surface is ready for archive inspection, extraction, and recompression flows so ZIP and RAR operations can live inside the same product shell.
toolBatchWatermarkDescription: This tool shell is prepared for bulk watermark placement across image and video sets, with space reserved for presets and output rules.

security.intro: MegaConvert is designed to give users enterprise-grade security controls without forcing every workflow through the cloud. Our architecture blends local browser execution with hardened cloud infrastructure so file processing can stay private, resilient, and transparent.
security.hybridBody: A substantial portion of MegaConvert workflows can execute directly on the user's device via WebAssembly (WASM), browser APIs, and local AI pipelines. When a task stays local, the underlying files may never leave the device at all. This local-first model provides a practical zero-knowledge posture for supported workflows because MegaConvert has no server-side visibility into files that are processed entirely in-browser.
security.cloudBody: When server-side processing is required, files are transmitted over TLS 1.3 and stored using AES-256 encryption at rest. Access to cloud processing systems is restricted by least-privilege controls, service isolation, and operational monitoring designed to reduce unauthorized access risk.
security.deletionBody: Cloud-processed source files and generated outputs are scheduled for deletion within 1 hour after processing completes. This shortened retention window is intentionally stricter than many competing services and is designed to minimize residual storage exposure.
security.complianceBody: MegaConvert is deployed on infrastructure operated by providers that maintain internationally recognized security assurance frameworks, including ISO/IEC 27001 and SOC 2 Type II. While those attestations apply to the underlying infrastructure and not as a blanket certification of every MegaConvert feature, we align our operational practices with those controls wherever applicable.
security.accountBody: Authentication endpoints, session handling, and abuse detection controls are used to protect accounts against unauthorized access, credential misuse, automated attacks, and fraudulent activity. Users remain responsible for safeguarding their own credentials and device security.
security.disclosureBody: If you believe you have identified a vulnerability, please report it through our official support or security contact channels. We review credible reports promptly and prioritize remediation based on severity and exploitability.

privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how MegaConvert collects, uses, protects, and deletes personal information in connection with our website, browser-based tools, account system, cloud processing endpoints, and related product experiences.
privacy.regulatoryBody: MegaConvert is designed to align with major privacy regimes, including the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) in the European Union, the California Consumer Privacy Act and California Privacy Rights Act (CCPA/CPRA), and Brazil's Lei Geral de Protecao de Dados (LGPD), to the extent these laws apply to our operations and users.
privacy.collectBody: We may collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, account credentials, support requests, and billing or subscription metadata where applicable. We may also process limited technical information such as browser type, device diagnostics, language preference, authentication events, and service telemetry needed to maintain reliability and security.
privacy.localFirstBody: Many MegaConvert workflows run locally inside the browser using WASM and on-device AI. In those cases, the file may never be uploaded to our servers at all. If a workflow requires cloud execution, we process only the minimum file and metadata necessary to complete the requested task.
privacy.usageItem1: To authenticate users and secure accounts.
privacy.usageItem2: To deliver file conversion, editing, OCR, and collaboration workflows.
privacy.usageItem3: To detect abuse, fraud, and legal or sanctions violations.
privacy.usageItem4: To maintain uptime, quality, observability, and service performance.
privacy.usageItem5: To comply with legal obligations and enforce our agreements.
privacy.noSaleTitle: No Sale, No File Profiling, No AI Training
privacy.noSaleBody: We do not sell personal information. We do not analyze the contents of user files for advertising purposes, and we do not use user files to train general-purpose AI or machine learning models. File contents are processed only to deliver the functionality explicitly requested by the user.
privacy.sharingBody: We may share limited information with infrastructure providers, payment vendors, authentication services, analytics or observability vendors, and other processors acting on our behalf, solely as needed to operate the service, maintain security, or comply with law. We may also disclose information when legally required or when necessary to protect rights, safety, or platform integrity.
privacy.retentionBody: We retain personal information only for as long as necessary to provide the service, preserve account integrity, meet legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our terms. Where cloud file processing is used, files are subject to strict short-lived deletion windows as described in our Security page.
privacy.rightsBody: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, restrict, or object to certain processing of your personal information. This includes the right to erasure and the right to request export of eligible account data, subject to applicable law and identity verification requirements.
privacy.securityBody: We use technical and organizational safeguards designed to protect information in transit and at rest, restrict internal access, reduce abuse risk, and preserve service integrity. No system can guarantee absolute security, but we aim to minimize data exposure through local-first architecture and short-lived cloud retention.
privacy.cookiesBody: MegaConvert uses cookies, local storage, and similar technologies for sessions, authentication, language preferences, and service analytics. For a detailed explanation, please review our Cookie Policy.
privacy.changesBody: We may update this Privacy Policy to reflect legal changes, product development, or operational needs. If we make material changes, we will update the effective date and provide additional notice where appropriate.
privacy.contactBody: Privacy-related requests, including deletion and data export requests, may be submitted through the support or contact channels made available within MegaConvert.

terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of MegaConvert, including our local-first file conversion tools, document workflows, AI-assisted features, and direct device-to-device handoff experiences.
terms.acceptanceBody: By accessing or using MegaConvert, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, you must not use the service.
terms.eligibilityBody: You must use MegaConvert only in compliance with applicable law and only if you have legal capacity to enter into these Terms. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for activity occurring under your account.
terms.permittedBody: You may use MegaConvert for lawful file processing, document editing, OCR, compression, and related workflows. You may not use the service to violate intellectual property rights, distribute unlawful content, evade security controls, or interfere with the platform or other users.
terms.localBody: Many MegaConvert features operate locally in the browser using WASM, AI models, and device-native capabilities. You remain responsible for the source files you process and for verifying the accuracy, legality, and fitness of any generated output before relying on it.
terms.sanctionsBody1: MegaConvert is subject to export control, sanctions, and trade compliance laws, including restrictions administered under OFAC frameworks, applicable European Union sanctions programs, and related local laws. The service is strictly prohibited in sanctioned or restricted jurisdictions and may not be used from, by, or for the benefit of persons located in or ordinarily resident in Russia, China, Iran, North Korea, Syria, or Cuba.
terms.sanctionsBody2: Belarus is explicitly EXEMPTED from these restrictions and service is fully available in this region. We may suspend, block, or terminate access where needed to maintain sanctions compliance, export control compliance, anti-abuse defenses, or broader legal risk management.
terms.availabilityBody: We may modify, suspend, or discontinue features at any time, including for security, maintenance, legal compliance, infrastructure migration, or product evolution. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability.
terms.disclaimersBody: MegaConvert is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we disclaim warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, non-infringement, and uninterrupted service.
terms.liabilityBody: To the fullest extent permitted by law, MegaConvert and its operators will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, exemplary, or punitive damages, or for any loss of data, revenue, profits, business opportunity, or goodwill arising from your use of the service. You use MegaConvert at your own risk, and the service is provided strictly on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis.
terms.terminationBody: We may suspend or terminate your access if we believe you violated these Terms, created legal or security risk, or used the service in a way that harms the platform, our partners, or other users.
terms.contactBody: Questions about these Terms may be directed through the product support channels made available in MegaConvert.

cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how MegaConvert uses cookies, local storage, and related browser technologies to provide secure access, maintain product state, and improve service reliability.
cookies.necessaryBody: Strictly necessary cookies and equivalent browser storage mechanisms are used to support authentication, session continuity, abuse prevention, CSRF protection, language preferences, and security-sensitive product behavior. These technologies are required for core product functions and cannot be disabled without affecting essential service operation.
cookies.analyticsBody: Where enabled, MegaConvert may use privacy-conscious analytics technologies to measure reliability, feature usage, conversion performance, PWA behavior, and product health. These analytics workflows may involve event telemetry pipelines, including ClickHouse-backed analytics or similar observability systems, and are used to improve stability rather than to profile the contents of user files.
cookies.localStateBody: Because MegaConvert includes local-first workflows and PWA capabilities, the application may store interface state, selected language, recent tool context, and other non-sensitive runtime preferences on the device to improve continuity across sessions.
cookies.preferencesBody: You can control cookies and local storage through your browser settings. Please note that blocking strictly necessary technologies may prevent login, session continuity, or secure operation of certain parts of the service.
cookies.changesBody: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect legal requirements, product changes, or measurement practices. Material changes will be reflected by updating the effective date above.

toolsPortal.title: Spatial tools portal for high-stakes files.

businessWorkflowPage.handoffReady: Secure handoff is ready for this workflow.
businessWorkflowPage.note: This route is fully wired for navigation, localization, and secure intake. You can connect the backend business processor next without redesigning the user experience.
businessWorkflowPage.noFile: Upload a file in the tools portal to attach it to this workflow.

exifMetadataStripper.title: EXIF/Metadata Stripper
exifMetadataStripper.description: Remove location tags, device fingerprints, and hidden metadata before assets leave your organization.

autoSubtitleGenerator.title: Auto-Subtitle Generator
autoSubtitleGenerator.description: Transcribe audio or video into polished subtitle tracks and review-ready text for global distribution.

invoiceScanner.title: AI Invoice Scanner
invoiceScanner.description: Extract vendors, totals, tax fields, and line items into audit-ready JSON for finance operations.

redactSensitiveData.title: Redact Sensitive Data
redactSensitiveData.description: Identify names, amounts, and confidential entities, then prepare AI-assisted redaction for secure sharing.

strictPdfA.title: Convert to Strict PDF/A
strictPdfA.description: Normalize complex documents into long-term archival PDF/A packages for courts, regulators, and procurement teams.

smartBrandWatermark.title: Smart Brand Watermark
smartBrandWatermark.description: Apply consistent logo overlays across batches of media while preserving presentation quality for client delivery.

apiDashboard.title: Lleva MegaConvert dentro de tu propio producto.
apiDashboard.description: Genera claves API, supervisa el uso y prepara la monetizacion para flujos de conversion local-first con respaldo cloud-fallback.
apiDashboard.gatewayDescription: Emite claves con alcance, mide el volumen de solicitudes y protege el acceso con planes de pago antes del lanzamiento publico del API.

keys.title: Tus claves API
keys.subtitle: Administra tokens de acceso para conversion del lado del servidor, orquestacion de webhooks y automatizacion embebida de workflows.
keys.emptyTitle: Aun no se han emitido claves API
keys.emptyBody: Genera una clave segura para conectar tu aplicacion al motor de conversion de MegaConvert. La creacion de claves API esta disponible en los planes Pro y Enterprise.

usage.title: Resumen de uso
usage.subtitle: Consulta el volumen de solicitudes, la tasa de exito y la latencia antes de activar la facturacion real.

paywall.title: Desbloquea la API de MegaConvert
paywall.description: Integra nuestro motor de conversion local-first y cloud-fallback en tus propias aplicaciones. Disponible en los planes Pro y Enterprise.

toasts.generated: Se genero una nueva clave API.
toasts.copied: La clave API se copio al portapapeles.
toasts.copyFailed: No se pudo copiar la clave API.
toasts.paywall: La generacion de claves API esta disponible en los planes Pro y Enterprise.

complianceGuard.title: Acceso denegado para esta region del dispositivo.
complianceGuard.description: MegaConvert no esta disponible en este contexto del dispositivo debido a controles de exportacion, filtrado de sanciones o restricciones regionales de cumplimiento.
complianceGuard.statusValue: Bloqueado por verificacion de zona horaria del dispositivo
complianceGuard.explainer: La zona horaria del dispositivo se trata como una senal adicional de cumplimiento y actualmente apunta a una jurisdiccion restringida.

previewViewer.unsupported: This format does not support inline preview.

quickLook.unavailable: Preview is unavailable for this format.
quickLook.label: Quick Look

batchUploader.title: Batch upload
batchUploader.description: Upload multiple files and process them as a queue.

smartAssistant.label: AI Assistant
smartAssistant.title: Intent-driven assistant
smartAssistant.description: Describe the result you want and let MegaConvert route the file through the strongest available workflow.
smartAssistant.dropTitle: Drop a file to start an AI-assisted flow
smartAssistant.dropHint: You can drag a file here or browse from the device to prepare the next action.
smartAssistant.promptPlaceholder: For example: extract the text, convert to PDF, or clean the background.

aiStudio.heroTitle: One prompt. One file. One intelligent pipeline.
aiStudio.heroDescription: AI Studio turns natural language into a clean conversion or enhancement route, keeps the interface focused, and preserves local-first privacy wherever possible.
aiStudio.dropTitle: Drop a file to open the AI lane
aiStudio.dropDescription: Bring in one file or a small batch, describe the outcome you want, and let MegaConvert compose the next workflow around it.
aiStudio.optimizingRoute: Optimizing the route across local and cloud engines.
aiStudio.standingBy: Standing by for the next instruction.
aiStudio.promptPlaceholder: Describe the result you want in plain language...

promptSuggestions.pdfToWord: Convert this PDF into an editable Word document
promptSuggestions.audioToMp3: Clean this audio and export it as MP3
promptSuggestions.imageToPng: Convert this image to PNG and keep the quality
promptSuggestions.compressVideo: Compress this video for lightweight sharing

crystalClear.title: Crystal Clear
crystalClear.copy: Enhance still images, normalize delivery formats, and prepare a cleaner visual asset.
crystalClear.prompt: Enhance this image and export a cleaner version

silence.title: Silence Control
silence.copy: Clean spoken audio, reduce noise, and ship a sharper listening experience.
silence.prompt: Clean the audio and export a polished listening version

smartCrop.title: Smart Crop
smartCrop.copy: Prepare clips for shorter delivery surfaces and lighter media outputs.
smartCrop.prompt: Trim and optimize this media for a shorter final cut

infoRows.browserFirst: Browser-first execution whenever the workflow can stay local.
infoRows.oneFlow: One prompt can trigger OCR, conversion, cleanup, or export handoff.
infoRows.localPrivacy: Files stay on device by default whenever the route supports it.

batchWatermark.title: Batch Watermark
batchWatermark.description: Apply a clean text watermark across a batch of images and export the processed set as a ZIP archive.
batchWatermark.dropHint: Supports up to {max} images in a single batch.

statuses.initial: Drop files to start a watermark batch.
statuses.filesAdded: Files added. Configure the watermark and run the batch.

errors.unsupportedFiles: Only image files are supported in this workflow.
errors.maxFiles: Only the first {max} files were kept for this batch.
errors.processingFailed: Could not generate the watermark batch.

exifScrubber.title: EXIF Scrubber
exifScrubber.description: Remove EXIF metadata from photo files before sharing them outside your device or organization.
exifScrubber.dropTitle: Drop an image to inspect metadata
exifScrubber.dropHint: JPEG files are fully scrubbed. Other image types pass through without hidden EXIF removal.
exifScrubber.resultPending: The cleaned result will appear here after processing.

statuses.initial: Drop a file to inspect and scrub metadata.
statuses.fileLoaded: File loaded. Privacy analysis is ready.
statuses.privacyOff: Privacy mode is disabled. Original file kept as-is.
statuses.nonJpeg: This format is passed through without EXIF scrubbing.

errors.scrubFailed: Could not scrub EXIF metadata from this file.

imageCompressor.title: Image Optimizer
imageCompressor.description: Preview compression levels visually, compare the before and after state, and export a lighter image without losing control.
imageCompressor.dropHint: JPEG, PNG, WEBP, GIF, and BMP are supported for local preview compression.
imageCompressor.sliderHint: Adjust the slider and release to recompute the preview.
imageCompressor.compareSlider: Move the divider to compare the optimized result.

statuses.initial: Drop an image to start optimization.
statuses.fileLoaded: Image loaded. Compression preview is ready.

errors.unsupportedFiles: Only image files are supported in the optimizer.
errors.compressionFailed: Could not compress the image locally.

localMediaConverter.title: Local Media Converter
localMediaConverter.description: Run browser-native video and audio conversion with a local FFmpeg worker and optional AI cleanup for audio sources.
localMediaConverter.dropTitle: Drop audio or video to convert locally
localMediaConverter.dropHint: The conversion stays on device when the browser supports the engine.
localMediaConverter.aiSectionDescription: For audio sources, you can remove noise and stabilize the speech track before exporting.
localMediaConverter.aiReadyHint: Enable AI cleanup to run the local speech enhancement pass before export.
localMediaConverter.aiAudioOnlyHint: AI cleanup is available only for audio-to-audio routes.

statuses.fileLoaded: File loaded. Pick the target format and run the worker.

ocrRecognition.title: OCR Recognition
ocrRecognition.description: Run OCR in the browser, monitor progress, edit the extracted text, and export a plain text result.
ocrRecognition.dropTitle: Drop an image to recognize text
ocrRecognition.dropHint: Best results come from clear scans, screenshots, and high-contrast photos.

statuses.fileLoaded: File loaded. Start OCR when ready.
statuses.noText: Recognition finished, but no text was detected.

errors.selectSource: Select a source image before running OCR.
errors.moduleInit: OCR module could not be initialized.
errors.clipboardUnavailable: Clipboard access is unavailable in this browser.
errors.copyFailed: Could not copy the recognized text.

pdfEditor.title: PDF Editor
pdfEditor.description: Visually stack PDF files, inspect the first page of each document, and merge them into a single export locally.
pdfEditor.dropTitle: Drop one or more PDF files
pdfEditor.dropHint: Each document is previewed locally before merge.
pdfEditor.emptyState: Add PDF files to build a merged stack.

statuses.initial: Drop PDF files to start the merge workflow.
statuses.loadFailed: Could not load the provided PDF files.

errors.unsupportedFormat: Only PDF files are supported here.
errors.previewFailed: Could not render the document preview.
errors.addPdfRequired: Add at least one PDF before merging.
errors.mergeFailed: Could not merge the selected PDF files.

mediaTrimmer.title: Media Trimmer
mediaTrimmer.description: Trim a precise fragment from a local media file before exporting it without re-encoding the whole source.
mediaTrimmer.dropTitle: Drop audio or video to trim
mediaTrimmer.dropHint: Load a media file, inspect the timeline, and export only the exact fragment you need.

statuses.initial: Drop a media file to start trimming.
statuses.fileLoaded: File loaded. Read the metadata and choose the range.
statuses.selectRange: Select the fragment range on the timeline.

errors.unsupportedBrowser: SharedArrayBuffer is unavailable in this browser. Open the app in a cross-origin isolated context.
errors.selectFile: Select a media file before trimming.
errors.durationMissing: Could not determine the media duration.
errors.invalidRange: The end time must be greater than the start time.
errors.trimFailed: Could not trim the selected fragment.

megaDrop.title: MegaDrop
megaDrop.createRoomHint: Create a room to show the QR code.

megaGrid.title: MegaGrid
megaGrid.description: Split a source file into browser-side segments, distribute work across worker devices, and merge the result back into one final media export.
megaGrid.shareCodeHint: Share this code or QR with worker devices.
megaGrid.nodeConnectedHint: This worker node is linked to the current cluster.
megaGrid.selectVideoHint: Choose a video to split across available browser workers.
megaGrid.segmentSizeHint: Shorter segments improve balancing across workers.
megaGrid.outputFormatHint: Pick the final media container for the distributed render.
megaGrid.noWorkers: No worker nodes are connected yet.
megaGrid.qrHint: Open this link on another device to join as a worker node.
megaGrid.linkPending: Create a session to generate a worker invite link.
megaGrid.pipelineBody: The master splits the source, sends segments to connected browsers over P2P, and then assembles the returned outputs locally.

errors.finalizeFailed: Could not assemble the final distributed output.
errors.workerDropped: A worker left the cluster before finishing its segment.
errors.workerProcessFailed: A worker failed while processing its assigned segment.
errors.createSessionFailed: Could not create a MegaGrid session.
errors.invalidSessionCode: Enter a valid six-digit session code.
errors.joinSessionFailed: Could not join the requested session.
errors.toggleReadyFailed: Could not update the worker readiness state.
errors.selectVideo: Select a source video before starting the distributed job.
errors.noReadyWorkers: At least one ready worker node is required.
errors.jobStartFailed: Could not start the distributed job.
errors.copyFailed: Could not copy the worker link.
errors.masterClosed: The master device closed the session.
errors.sessionClosed: The session is no longer available.

statuses.createOrJoin: Create a session or join an existing cluster.
statuses.finalizeFailed: Could not finalize the distributed render.
statuses.workerBound: Worker bound to the active session.
statuses.sessionCreated: Session created. Share the code with worker devices.
statuses.snapshotWaiting: Waiting for worker nodes to join.

planIndividualDesc: Para especialistas independientes que desbloquean flujos de trabajo premium mediante promociones aprobadas, beneficios educativos o programas de socios.
planIndividualFeature4: Se requiere acceso promocional o verificado

pricingPage.title: Escala tus flujos de archivos.
pricingPage.subtitle: Empieza con 30 dias de Pro gratis. No necesitas tarjeta.
pricingPage.footnote: Cada cuenta nueva empieza con 30 dias de Pro.

free.name: Gratis
free.description: Herramientas esenciales para las tareas de cada dia.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Libera toda la potencia de la IA local y del procesamiento en la nube.

individual.name: Individual
individual.description: Limites e infraestructura a medida para cargas intensivas.

promoModal.title: Canjear codigo promo
promoModal.subtitle: Introduce el codigo del admin para desbloquear acceso Individual o beneficios especiales de Pro.
promoModal.label: Codigo promo
promoModal.hint: Lo llevaremos al espacio de facturacion para completar el canje.

account.guestCopy: Inicia sesion para gestionar facturacion, canjear un codigo del admin y mantener tu acceso Pro en un solo lugar.
account.manageCopy: La sincronizacion de checkout y beneficios llegara aqui a continuacion. Por ahora, este espacio ya sirve para pasar a upgrade y canjear promos.
account.statusNote: Cada cuenta nueva recibe 30 dias de Pro automaticamente al registrarse.
account.promoSaved: Codigo promo guardado para canjearlo en facturacion.

student.title: ¿Eres estudiante o educador?
student.description: Obtén toda la potencia de MegaConvert Pro con un enorme 50% de descuento. Verifica tu estado para desbloquear tu flujo de trabajo académico.
student.redirecting: Redirigiendo a la verificación de SheerID...

studio.welcomeTitle: Un espacio de nivel escritorio para flujos de video, foto, audio y generación.
studio.welcomeSubtitle: Elige un estudio para abrir. Este shell premium está pensado para líneas de tiempo, capas, inspectores y copilotos de IA.
studio.welcomeHint: Selecciona una herramienta en el dock o entra en uno de los cuatro estudios de abajo.
studio.placeholderBody: Aquí se integrarán después líneas de tiempo, paneles de inspección, navegadores de recursos y copilotos de IA.
studio.videoDescription: Editor de video multipista avanzado con subtítulos automáticos por IA y efectos.
studio.photoDescription: Manipulación y retoque profesional de imágenes basado en capas.
studio.audioDescription: Mezcla, recorte y masterización de audio con alta fidelidad.
studio.aiDescription: Transforma texto en imágenes hiperrealistas con modelos de nueva generación.

megaPhoto.canvasDropActive: Suéltala para colocarla en el lienzo

megaMeet.lobbySubtitle: Revisa tu cámara y únete a la sala {{roomId}} con chat protegido de extremo a extremo.
megaMeet.cameraPreviewUnavailable: Vista previa de la cámara no disponible
megaMeet.cameraPermissionHint: Permite el acceso a la cámara o continúa solo con avatar.
megaMeet.chatSecurityHint: Canal cifrado de extremo a extremo
megaMeet.chatSidebarHint: Los mensajes permanecen dentro de esta sala
megaMeet.mockMessageHandshake: Claves intercambiadas. El canal de la sala está listo.
megaMeet.mockMessageAgenda: Dejé las notas del sprint en el hilo seguro.
